violations.text: Walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Inspector observed packages of rice crackers without labels. Per interview with PIC, rice crackers are purchased that way from oversees. PIC decided to discard items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and produce knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Noodles packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Wood is used in the construction of meat grinder shelf/base in the meat cutting area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. Inspector provided. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom and basement was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Hand-washing sinks in the bathroom and basement were lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The produce cutting area does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Scrubs were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. - slicer - knives - meat grinder - meat bandsaw The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took items out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Inspector observed an old chemical bottle (Windex) containing water in the produce cutting area. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Various items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The door to the outside, located in the in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Various items were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer and dry storage shipping container. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Knife was observed stored on an unclean surface. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving and equipment platforms in the food prep areas (meat and produce areas) and bathroom above mop sink. Carboard is used in construction of shelf liners in the retail coolers. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025

The cutting boards in the meat cutting area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Hand-washing sink in the basement was lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Inspector observed plumbing detached from handwashing sink in the bathroom. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The condensate from the open case refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed behind building. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/30/2025

The walls in the walk-in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair (needs to be resealed). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food prep areas. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Inspector observed GewSouki from an unapproved source. Product Disposed Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Various food product packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023
The condensate from the air conditioning unit is dripping condensate onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023
The ceilings in the basement area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2023
Inspector observed plastic containers of fermented vegetables and crabs from an unapproved source, Product disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Various food product packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Various food product were observed stored on the floor in the retail area and walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The cutting boards in the meat dept are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The non-food contact surfaces: 1.produce area shelves 2.food cutting cart 3.open case meat coolers throughout establishment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The facility is lacking a mop sink. At least one mop sink or one curbed cleaning facility equipped with a floor drain must be provided and conveniently located for the cleaning of mops or similar wet floor cleaning tools and for the disposal of mop water and similar liquid waste. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back outside area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The reach in cooler in the back kitchen area is in poor repair(missing covering). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The: 1.walls in meat dept 2.fans in walk in cooler 3.walls and shelves in produce walk in area 4.floors throughout establishment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
The ceilings in the basement area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
